# Lisa T. Miller — AI Strategy for Healthcare Operations

> Lisa T. Miller is an AI in healthcare strategist with more than 30 years inside hospital operations. She founded VIE Healthcare Consulting in 1999, generated over $1 billion in documented savings, holds two U.S. patents, and now guides health systems through practical AI adoption.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://lisatmiller.ai/): AI strategy for hospital and health system operations
- [Services](https://lisatmiller.ai/services/): AI assessment, installation, and enablement for health systems
- [About Lisa T. Miller](https://lisatmiller.ai/about-lisa-t-miller/): 30+ years in hospital operations, founder of VIE Healthcare, two U.S. patents
- [AI for Healthcare](https://lisatmiller.ai/ai-healthcare/): What AI can do in healthcare today across 10 use case categories
- [AI for the Business of Healthcare](https://lisatmiller.ai/ai-business-of-healthcare/): Nine areas where AI carries real work in healthcare operations
- [Statistics and Benchmarks](https://lisatmiller.ai/statistics/): Verified healthcare AI statistics and benchmarks, every figure sourced
- [Resources](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/): Articles and guides on AI in healthcare
- [Where Does AI Fit? Readiness Assessment](https://lisatmiller.ai/where-does-ai-fit/): Eight-question self-assessment, three minutes, no email required
- [Contact](https://lisatmiller.ai/contact/): Schedule an executive strategy call

## Articles
- [AI Is Not a Software Purchase](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/ai-is-not-a-software-purchase/)
- [The Work Nobody Went Into Healthcare to Do](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/work-nobody-went-into-healthcare-to-do/)
- [Your Best People Carry Your Most Broken Processes](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/your-best-people-carry-broken-processes/)
- [What AI Can Actually Do for the Revenue Cycle](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/what-ai-can-do-for-revenue-cycle/)
- [Deciding Where AI Fits, a CFO's Guide](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/deciding-where-ai-fits-cfo-guide/)
- [Everyone Is Selling Intelligence. Nobody Has Read Your Operations.](https://lisatmiller.ai/resources/everyone-is-selling-intelligence/)

## Key Topics
- AI in healthcare: clinical documentation, chart review, risk stratification, patient access, revenue cycle
- AI for the business of healthcare: capacity forecasting, service line profitability, CFO and COO operations support
- Work-first AI adoption: map the workflow, baseline it, match proven capability, prove in 90 days
- Revenue cycle: denial prevention, eligibility verification, claim scrubbing, appeals automation
